title: Sony to discontinue PlayStation discs starting January 2028
summary: The company ceases production of physical discs, generating reactions in the industry and among players, while the future of the physical format is debated.

title: Cyberpunk 2077 surpasses 40 million copies sold
summary: CD Projekt Red celebrates the sales milestone as a testament to the game's enduring success.

title: First Steam Machines suffer a critical failure nicknamed 'Red Line of Death'
summary: The hardware problem, similar to the Xbox 360's Red Ring of Death, worries Valve's console users.

title: Final Fantasy VII Revelation will have a story expansion pass and may not close the trilogy
summary: Leaked listings suggest additional content that extends the story beyond the intended ending.

title: Clair Obscur: Expedition 33 director defends imperfections in video games
summary: Studio Sandfall states that games that aim to be perfect are often boring and they will not change their approach.

title: Development of Suicide Squad: Kill the Justice League pushed its creators to the limit
summary: The director admits the project became a spreadsheet and almost drove developers away from the industry.

title: Bandai Namco reveals the future of Dragon Ball Xenoverse and new DLC
summary: The next chapter of Future Saga for Xenoverse 2 is announced and plans for the series are detailed.

title: Global memory crisis affects video games: Cinder City reduces requirements and Meta seeks solutions
summary: While SK hynix invests in new plants, games adjust their RAM demands amid the shortage.

title: New games and accessories showcase the potential of Switch 2
summary: Biped 2, Ninjala 2, and Rise of the Tomb Raider are preparing for the console, along with a Gulikit portable dock.

title: Industry figures harshly criticize artificial intelligence in video games
summary: The former Dragon Age writer and the CEO of Palantir agree in pointing out the dangers and problems of the AI business model.

title: Two new video game studios emerge in Madrid and the US with radical approaches
summary: Former Tequila Works employees and industry veterans form //18.bravo and Tuned In to innovate in development.

title: Supermassive Games CEO resigns and a Spanish studio loses its director after 11 years
summary: Robert Henrysson leaves Supermassive Games while another studio faces the departure of its CEO after a recent release.

title: Players get massive discounts on GTA 6 and a popular Steam survival game
summary: An oversight at Best Buy allows buying GTA 6 for $2, and a survival game drops its price before its final price increase.

title: Honkai: Star Rail releases its 4.4 update 'In Ravages Does the Whistle Sound' on July 15
summary: The new version will bring additional content and events to the popular turn-based role-playing game.

title: Demon Slayer: Infinity Castle arrives on streaming in July 2026
summary: The long-awaited animated adaptation of the final arc will be available on digital platforms.

title: Solo Leveling movie will premiere in theaters before season 3
summary: The film will serve as a bridge between seasons of the successful anime series.

title: Google loses antitrust appeal and must pay record fine of 4.1 billion euros
summary: The sanction imposed by the EU represents a heavy blow for the tech giant, although it is less than 3% of its annual profit.

title: Assassin's Creed Black Flag Resynced will verify compatibility with Steam Deck and Steam Machine
summary: The reissue of the pirate classic promises a smooth portable experience without compromises.

title: Slay the Spire 2 adds 15 multiplayer cards and makes mod installation easier
summary: The update introduces powerful cooperative cards and improves accessibility for players.

title: Paradox will remove inactive accounts if not logged in before next year
summary: The company reminds players to check their accounts to avoid loss of data and access to games.
